title: epidendrum rugulosum
intro: Epidendrum rugulosum, also known as the "rough Epidendrum," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Epidendrum rugulosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, with the leaves and roots being the primary components used in herbal preparations.
